risk_rationale: The draft bill focuses on child marriage prevention, which does not directly conflict with TikTok's existing minor protection standards. However, it may indirectly influence age verification processes.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Minimum registration age of 13 years in the US.
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: No direct requirement specified, but implications for stricter age verification to prevent child marriage.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The draft bill may necessitate enhanced age verification measures to ensure compliance with child marriage prevention efforts.

remediations.title: Enhance Age Verification Measures
remediations.description: Implement additional age verification checks to align with potential requirements from the Child Marriage Prevention Act.
acceptance_criteria: Implement additional age verification steps for new registrations
Ensure compliance with any future specific requirements from the Child Marriage Prevention Act

business_impact: Minimal immediate impact, but potential future requirements for enhanced age verification could increase onboarding friction.
recommended_actions: Monitor the progression of the draft bill for any changes that may directly impact TikTok's policies.
Prepare to implement enhanced age verification measures if the bill passes with relevant provisions.
Engage with legal and policy teams to assess potential future compliance requirements.
